name: KrillApp.Client
title: Krill Client
description: Root client node that manages connections to Krill servers. On startup, loads stored server nodes from persistence, connects to each via HTTPS, and starts a network beacon to discover new servers automatically. Handles both web (WASM) and native platform environments.
shortDescription: Root client node that discovers and connects to Krill servers on the network.
llmPurpose: Root client-side node that discovers Krill servers on the network, loads persisted server connections, and manages the client application state.
llmBehavior: loads stored server nodes from file persistence
connects to known servers via HTTPS
starts network beacon for automatic server discovery
llmTypicalUseCases: launch the Krill app and discover servers
connect to a known Krill server
llmCreationHints: The Client node is automatically created as the root of the client application. Users do not typically create this node manually.

llmConnectionHints.role: root structural node for the client application

llmExamples: Show all servers on my network.
Connect to the Krill server at 192.168.1.10.
